'''Korlings''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Korlings system/Legends|Korlings system]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], and home to a noble family. It was rumored to be the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the notorious [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Faarl]] the Conqueror.

{{Planet-stub}}
